page_title_index: Smart Home, Security & Surveillance | S‑ELECTRICITY Morocco
meta_description_index: Smart home automation & domotique in Morocco — smart lighting & switches, Wi‑Fi/network optimization, security cameras & smart locks. Expert electrical installation in Tetouan.
meta_description_previous_work: Portfolio of real installations in Morocco: smart home automation, smart lighting, Wi‑Fi/network optimization, security cameras & smart locks. Electrical installations in Tetouan.
spa_services_lead: Smart solutions for both residential and commercial clients.
spa_a_services: We offer smart home automation (KNX, Wi-Fi, Zigbee), video surveillance & security cameras, network & Wi-Fi optimization, smart locks & access control, professional electrical installations, and lighting design — for both residential and commercial properties.
spa_a_prices: There isn't a one-size-fits-all price. The final cost depends on the scope of work — whether it's a simple smart switch setup, a full surveillance system, or a complete home automation project. Contact us for a free personalized quote.
spa_q_sell_products: Do you sell smart home products?
spa_a_sell_products: Yes! We sell a wide range of smart home devices from trusted brands like EAE Technology (KNX), Shelly, SONOFF, and Reyee. Browse our full product catalog on the website and contact us to place an order — we deliver across Morocco.
spa_q_schedule: How do I schedule an appointment?
spa_a_schedule: Call us at +212 654-132112 or reach out through our website — we're happy to hear from you anytime.
spa_team: Our team of experts is ready to design a tailored smart home or commercial solution that perfectly fits your needs and budget.
spa_trusted_partner: Your Trusted Partner in Smart Home & Security Solutions
spa_desc_smart_home: Complete smart home solutions including installation, setup, and programming of connected devices for seamless control and automation.
spa_transform_house: From smart home automation to professional networking and security — we design, install, and maintain complete intelligent systems for homes and businesses across Morocco.
spa_tagline: One team, one call — everything from wiring to Wi-Fi, cameras to KNX. Professionally installed, fully supported.
spa_intro: Smart home automation & electrical solutions in Morocco. Upgrade your home for a modern & seamless experience.
spa_upgrade_business: Premium smart home, electrical & security solutions — for homeowners, project developers, and professional installers across Morocco.
spa_thanks_home_automation: Thanks to home automation, your home is just a click away. Whether you're at home or out, control your lighting, motorized systems, gates, heating, or air conditioning... with a fingertip.
spa_desc_smart_locks: Secure your home with smart locks and doorbells featuring remote access, real-time alerts, and expert installation.
spa_desc_thermostat: Energy-efficient thermostat installation and programming, including integration with your smart home system.
spa_desc_security_cameras: Custom surveillance setups with motion-activated cameras, mobile access, and expert system configuration.
spa_desc_voice_integration: Hands-free control with Alexa, Google Assistant, or Siri—fully configured for your home devices and routines.
spa_desc_network: Optimized home networks with mesh Wi-Fi and expert placement for fast, stable, and full-home coverage.
spa_desc_smart_lighting: Install and automate lighting systems with smart switches, dimmers, and remote controls for personalized ambiance.
spa_desc_electrical_installations: Professional electrical installation services including lighting systems, distribution boards, wiring, earthing, and electrical safety upgrades for homes and businesses.
spa_desc_power_distribution_panels: Design and installation of power distribution systems, main panels, subpanels, and load balancing for reliable power delivery.
spa_desc_lighting_fixture_installation: Interior and exterior lighting installation, LED retrofits, emergency lighting and energy-efficient lighting design.
spa_desc_cabling_wiring_solutions: Structured power cabling, conduit and cable tray installation, and wiring for electrical and control systems installed to industry standards.
spa_feat_thermostats: Smart Home & KNX — lighting, blinds, HVAC, all automated.
spa_feat_locks: Security & Surveillance — cameras, motion sensors, smart locks.
spa_feat_voice: Network & Wi-Fi — mesh coverage, access points, enterprise solutions.
spa_feat_lighting: Electrical Installations — panels, wiring, lighting fixtures.
spa_feat_security: Voice & App Control — Alexa, Google, Siri, mobile dashboards.

spa_recent_projects_desc: Real installations from satisfied customers across Morocco. Each project showcases our commitment to quality and attention to detail.
spa_previous_work_lead: See the quality and craftsmanship of our smart home automation, security, and electrical installations across Morocco.
